---
title: "W2 - SAS DATA Step to R"
author: "Louis Chou"
date: "2026-06-03"
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
```

## Exercise 1: IF/ELSE → case_when() Basic

```{r}
# Add efficiency column based on mpg:
# mpg >= 25 → "Efficient"
# mpg >= 15 → "Average"
# others   → "Inefficient"
result1 <- mtcars %>%
  mutate(
    efficiency = case_when(
      mpg >= 25 ~ "Efficient",
      mpg >= 15 ~ "Average",
      TRUE      ~ "Inefficient"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(mpg, efficiency)

result1

# Verify all three groups exist
result1 %>%
  group_by(efficiency) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
```

## Exercise 2: Multiple Conditions in case_when()

```{r}
# Add car_type column:
# cyl == 4 AND mpg >= 25 → "Eco"
# cyl == 8               → "Performance"
# others                 → "Standard"
result2 <- mtcars %>%
  mutate(
    car_type = case_when(
      cyl == 4 & mpg >= 25 ~ "Eco",
      cyl == 8             ~ "Performance",
      TRUE                 ~ "Standard"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(cyl, mpg, car_type)

result2
```

## Exercise 3: String Operations with stringr

```{r}
# Create sample dataset
drug_data <- data.frame(
  subjid  = c("ABC-001", "ABC-002", "ABC-003"),
  drug_nm = c("  Aspirin  ", "IBUPROFEN", "paracetamol")
)

# 1. id_num:    extract last 3 characters from subjid
# 2. drug_clean: remove leading/trailing whitespace
# 3. drug_upper: convert drug_clean to uppercase
result3 <- drug_data %>%
  mutate(
    id_num     = str_sub(subjid, 5),
    drug_clean = str_trim(drug_nm),
    drug_upper = str_to_upper(drug_clean)
  )

result3

# Verify whitespace removal
drug_data %>%
  mutate(
    before = nchar(drug_nm),
    after  = nchar(str_trim(drug_nm))
  )
```

## Exercise 4: Date Operations with lubridate

```{r}
# Create sample dataset
timeline <- data.frame(
  subjid  = c("001", "002", "003"),
  rand_dt = as.Date(c("2024-01-15", "2024-02-01", "2024-03-10")),
  end_dt  = as.Date(c("2024-06-30", "2024-07-15", "2024-09-01"))
)

# 1. duration:   days between rand_dt and end_dt
# 2. rand_year:  extract year from rand_dt
# 3. rand_month: extract month from rand_dt
result4 <- timeline %>%
  mutate(
    duration   = as.numeric(end_dt - rand_dt),
    rand_year  = year(rand_dt),
    rand_month = month(rand_dt)
  )

result4
```
